sql.trim: t1.ATTRIBUTE_15, t1.ATTRIBUTE_14, t1.ATTRIBUTE_13, t1.ATTRIBUTE_12, t1.IDCARD, t1.ATTRIBUTE_11, t1.TRADE_UNION_ID, t1.POST, t1.ATTRIBUTE_10, t1.SEX, t1.USER_ID, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.NATION, t1.ORIGN, t1.PARTY_MONEY, t1.STATUS, t1.CATEGORY, t1.DATA_4, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.BIRTHDAY, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.DEPT_ID, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.EDUCATION_LEVEL, t1.JOIN_PARTY, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.ATTRIBUTE_09, t1.ATTRIBUTE_08, t1.ATTRIBUTE_07, t1.PROFESSIONAL_RANK, t1.ONOFF_JOB, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.USER_CODE, t1.POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_TRADE_UNION_MB t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_TRADE_UNION_MB
ATTRIBUTE_15,
ATTRIBUTE_14,
ATTRIBUTE_13,
ATTRIBUTE_12,
IDCARD,
ATTRIBUTE_11,
TRADE_UNION_ID,
POST,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
SEX,
USER_ID,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
NATION,
ORIGN,
PARTY_MONEY,
STATUS,
CATEGORY,
DATA_4,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
BIRTHDAY,
CREATED_BY,
DEPT_ID,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
EDUCATION_LEVEL,
JOIN_PARTY,
CREATION_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
PROFESSIONAL_RANK,
ONOFF_JOB,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
USER_CODE,
POLITICAL_OUTLOOK,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
#{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute14,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{attribute13,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{tradeUnionId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{category,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_TRADE_UNION_MB( ATTRIBUTE_15 , ATTRIBUTE_14 , ATTRIBUTE_13 , ATTRIBUTE_12 , IDCARD , ATTRIBUTE_11 , TRADE_UNION_ID , POST , ATTRIBUTE_10 , SEX , USER_ID , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , NATION , ORIGN , PARTY_MONEY , STATUS , CATEGORY , DATA_4 , ID , CREATED_DEPT , LAST_UPDATE_IP , BIRTHDAY , CREATED_BY , DEPT_ID , ATTRIBUTE_04 , LAST_UPDATED_BY , ATTRIBUTE_03 , ATTRIBUTE_02 , EDUCATION_LEVEL , JOIN_PARTY , CREATION_DATE , ATTRIBUTE_09 , ATTRIBUTE_08 , ATTRIBUTE_07 , PROFESSIONAL_RANK , ONOFF_JOB , ATTRIBUTE_06 , ATTRIBUTE_05 , USER_CODE , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY )
select #{item.attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute14,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.attribute13,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.tradeUnionId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.category,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_TRADE_UNION_MB
ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
IDCARD = #{idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
TRADE_UNION_ID = #{tradeUnionId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POST = #{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORIGN = #{orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_MONEY = #{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CATEGORY = #{category,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_4 = #{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOIN_PARTY = #{joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ONOFF_JOB = #{onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_CODE = #{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_TRADE_UNION_MB set ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , IDCARD = #{idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , TRADE_UNION_ID = #{tradeUnionId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POST = #{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORIGN = #{orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_MONEY = #{partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , STATUS = #{status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CATEGORY = #{category,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_4 = #{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_PARTY = #{joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ONOFF_JOB = #{onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_CODE = #{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_TRADE_UNION_MB set ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{item.attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{item.attribute14,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{item.attribute13,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{item.attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , IDCARD = #{item.idcard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{item.attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , TRADE_UNION_ID = #{item.tradeUnionId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POST = #{item.post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , NATION = #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORIGN = #{item.orign,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_MONEY = #{item.partyMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , STATUS = #{item.status,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CATEGORY = #{item.category,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_4 = #{item.data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDAY = #{item.birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{item.educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_PARTY = #{item.joinParty,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{item.professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ONOFF_JOB = #{item.onoffJob,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_CODE = #{item.userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{item.politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.select: select dtuo.LEAGUE_NAME，dtuo.id from dyn_trade_union_organiza dtuo WHERE PARENT_ID !='-1' order by dtuo.id

WITH PSUA AS (select dtuo.LEAGUE_NAME，dtuo.id from dyn_trade_union_organiza dtuo WHERE PARENT_ID != '-1' order by dtuo.id) ,PSUB AS( select count(attribute_03) AS TRUCOUNT ,attribute_03 from dyn_trade_union_mb dtum group by attribute_03 order by attribute_03 ) ,PSUC AS ( select * from PSUA LEFT JOIN PSUB ON PSUA.league_name=PSUB.attribute_03 ) select NVL(TRUCOUNT,0) AS TRUCOUNT from PSUC
select dtuo.LEAGUE_NAME，dtuo.id from dyn_trade_union_organiza dtuo WHERE PARENT_ID !='-1' order by dtuo.id

WITH PSUA AS (select dtuo.LEAGUE_NAME，dtuo.id from dyn_trade_union_organiza dtuo WHERE PARENT_ID != '-1' order by dtuo.id) ,PSUB AS( select count(dtum.ATTRIBUTE_03)AS TRUCOUNT ,dtum.ATTRIBUTE_03 from dyn_trade_union_mb dtum WHERE dtum.ATTRIBUTE_04 is null group by dtum.ATTRIBUTE_03 order by dtum.ATTRIBUTE_03 ) ,PSUC AS ( select * from PSUA LEFT JOIN PSUB ON PSUA.LEAGUE_NAME=PSUB.ATTRIBUTE_03 ) select NVL(TRUCOUNT,0) AS TRUCOUNT from PSUC
